strategistNote.title: You are bigger than your dashboard said — but messier than you thought
strategistNote.body: The ceasefire broke the war thesis. XLE is closed (+20%), the energy risk premium is gone. MSFT fully closed Apr 24 at a loss — the AI thesis didn't hold at these levels. BTC reopened at $90K avg, now down ~15%. The winners (TSM +36%, ICLN +20%, VTI +9%) are doing the heavy lifting. $1,063 cash sits idle. The question now isn't whether to deploy — it's where. Copper rotation (FCX, SCCO) or stay defensive (GDX, VTI DCA)?

positions.label: VTI (Total Market ETF)
positions.notes: DCA core. 19.33 sh @ $323.51 = $6,254 cost basis. Apr 6 added $1,309 (4.04 sh). SL -8% / TP1 +15% / TP2 +25%. Monthly DCA — TPs reduce, never exit.

positions.label: QQQ (Nasdaq 100 ETF)
positions.notes: Tech recovery play. 2.27 sh @ $607.95 = $1,380 cost. SL -8% / TP1 +20% / TP2 +30%. Reassess if tech leadership breaks.

positions.label: Pinterest (eToro)
positions.notes: eToro: 42.52 sh @ $24.44 = $1,039. SEPARATE: 1,429 sh RSU grant at employer broker — not eToro. Watch earnings catalyst.

positions.label: Bitcoin (re-entered Apr 7)
positions.notes: REOPENED after Apr 7 close. 0.0557 BTC @ $90,775 avg. New SL $70K (~-23%). Discipline question: second BTC trade in 2 weeks at higher avg.

positions.label: iShares Global Clean Energy ETF
positions.notes: 57.76 sh @ $16.62. Renewable rotation. SL $15 / TP1 $22 (+13%) / TP2 $25 (+29%). Trim into strength.

positions.label: Taiwan Semiconductor ADR
positions.notes: 2.10 sh @ $295.14 avg = $620. Built up over many small jaynemesis lots — biggest jaynemesis winner. SL $265 / TP1 $380 (+29%) / TP2 $420 (+42%). Watch Taiwan-China geopolitics.

copyPortfolio.note: 7 holdings (~$21.5K combined). Dividend-confirmed: LRCX, Saab AB, Wheaton Precious Metals, GE Vernova, Micron, Royal Gold, Nutrien. Individual cost basis unconfirmed. Treat as one allocation block.

closedPositions.label: Microsoft (remaining lot)
closedPositions.reason: Jaynemesis closed remaining MSFT lots Apr 24. Entries from $532 (Oct 2025) and $390 (Mar 2026). Position fully exited.

closedPositions.label: Kongsberg Gruppen (EuropeDefense copier)
closedPositions.reason: EuropeDefense copier exited all KOG.OL lots Apr 22 at ~374.90 NOK.

closedPositions.label: XLE (Energy ETF)
closedPositions.reason: Thesis broken — Hormuz ceasefire killed energy risk premium. Clean exit.

closedPositions.label: Gold CFD (20x leverage)
closedPositions.reason: Opened Apr 9 at $4,774. Caught reversal in 3 days. Largest single loss — lesson: no 20x leverage.

closedPositions.label: Netflix (4 lots)
closedPositions.reason: Jaynemesis closed all 4 NFLX lots Apr 16. Combined small profit.

closedPositions.label: Bitcoin residual lot
closedPositions.reason: Tiny 0.000876 BTC lot closed. Re-opened position at $90,775 avg — see active book.

warStatus.description: US-Iran 2-week ceasefire effective April 7 (Trump-brokered). Strait of Hormuz dispute unresolved. XLE closed +20%. War risk premium gone from markets.

actionItems.label: Pinterest (eToro) — below stop $20, decide: honour stop or re-evaluate thesis
Deploy $1,063 idle cash (VTI DCA / GDX / dry powder)
Redefine 115K AED deployment triggers — war thesis is dead
Move idle AED to Wio Fixed Saving Space (4% p.a.) if not deploying within 7 days

geopolitical.notes: US-Iran 2-week ceasefire effective April 7. Strait of Hormuz dispute unresolved. Monitor for expiry/escalation.

etoro.notes: Net period P&L: -$786.99 on closed positions. Unrealized equity recovered to $39,417 vs $35,790 start. Biggest drag: crypto (-$398) and CFDs (-$272). ETFs only positive asset class (+$66).

portfolio.notes: AED 1M goal — Flip target 25%+ net ROI, Hold target 8%+ yield

watchlist.smartcrowd: Monitor for Flip deals (35%+ below market) and Hold deals (8%+ yield)
